name: Aplets and Cotlets
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Apple juice or unsweetened apple juice
2 tbsp Lime juice, or more as needed
recipeInstructions:
Makes about 64 small cubes
1. Soften the gelatin in 1/2 cup of apple juice.
2. Boil the remaining apple juice with sugar for 15 minutes to concentrate it.
3. Mix lemon and lime juice separately.
4. Add the lemon-lime juice mixture and all but 1/4 cup cornstarch to dissolve into the concentrated sugar mixture.
5. Combine both gelatin and cornstarch mixtures with the boiled juice, then boil rapidly for 10 minutes until very thick, stirring constantly.
6. Taste and adjust sweetness and acidity as desired.
7. Mix in chopped walnuts.
8. Pour the mixture into a greased 9-by-9-inch baking pan.
9. Let the paste set for at least 12 hours or overnight.
10. Cut with a sharp knife into squares.
11. Combine the reserved 1/4 cup cornstarch and powdered sugar.
12. Remove each square with a spatula and roll in the powdered sugar mixture to prevent sugar from clumping.
